form.formComment: Last start finished 4th on April 9 over 300m at this track behind She Lies Easy beaten 6 lengths (17.39) in a Grade 5. Thereabouts at the last couple. Suited here and likely to run well.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in her races. The latest effort was a 13 length seventh over 411m at this track. Others have better credentials.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 300m at this track. Likely to find this too tough.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (23.86) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fifth and beaten 8 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. Will need some luck to feature.

form.formComment: At the last outing finished 5th over 300m at Taree Super Track beaten 5.5 lengths (18.19) behind Keylin in a Mix 2/3 on April 11. Has ability and looks a winning hope.
